basic_details.job_title: ISI Kolkata Project Linked Person Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indian Statistical Institute (ISI) Project linked person Notification 2026 has been released on 03 July 2026 on the official website isical.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ISI Project linked person Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Women/differently abled candidates. Age relaxation may be given to the outstanding candidates or candidates with relevant experience.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in any field of Psychology/ Applied Psychology
qualification.details: Master's degree in any field of Psychology/ Applied Psychology

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ISI Project linked person Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview.
Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification.

Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable).
Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification.
Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview.
Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities.
Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

rows.indian_statistical_institute_isi: Master's degree in any field of Psychology/ Applied Psychology

content_sections.heading: ISI Project linked person Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ISI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ISI Project linked person Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master's degree in any field of Psychology/ Applied Psychology

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Women/differently abled candidates. Age relaxation may be given to the outstanding candidates or candidates with relevant experience.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ISI Project linked person Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ISI Project linked person Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for ISI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the current recruitment drive by the Indian Statistical Institute (ISI) is Project linked person. This is a contractual government job opportunity.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ISI Project linked person Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project linked person post in the Indian Statistical Institute (ISI) recruitment drive for 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ISI Project linked person posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Project linked person posts at ISI is Walk-in. Interested candidates need to attend an interview directly on the specified date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the walk-in interview date for ISI Project linked person Recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project linked person post at the Indian Statistical Institute (ISI) is scheduled for 20 July 2026. Candidates should report on time.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for Project linked person post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project linked person post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/Women/differently abled candidates as per rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the required qualification for Project linked person?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Project linked person post must possess a Master's degree in any field of Psychology or Applied Psychology from a recognized university or institution.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Project linked person at ISI?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project linked person post at the Indian Statistical Institute (ISI) will receive a salary of Rs. 20000 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for ISI Project linked person Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for the ISI Project linked person Recruitment 2026. Candidates from all categories (General/OBC, SC/ST) are exempted from fees.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for ISI Project linked person?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project linked person post primarily involves a Walk-in Interview. A Written Test may also be conducted if deemed necessary by the institute.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project linked person post will be conducted in Kolkata, West Bengal, with pincode 700108. The exact venue details will be in the official notification.
